description_long: A male security guard is depicted wearing a formal black suit with matching trousers and a white dress shirt, complemented by a striped tie. His shoes are black and polished, and he has a neatly groomed mustache and slicked-back hair. The suit jacket features a visible badge or insignia on the left chest, indicating his security role. His hands are gloved in white, adding to the formality and professionalism of his appearance. The overall uniform is tailored and standardized, with no visible equipment or accessories such as radios or belts. The guard's posture is upright and alert, with arms extended horizontally to the sides.
description: A male security guard in a formal black suit, white gloves, and striped tie, with a visible badge on his chest and an alert, upright posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the security guard's face, striped tie, white gloves, and chest badge.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, slicked-back hair, and the straight line of the suit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit, hair, and the symmetrical extension of both arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, mustache, and the suit's side seam.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a formal black suit with a matching jacket and trousers, a white dress shirt, a gray and white striped tie, and white gloves. The uniform is highly standardized and professional, with a visible badge on the left chest of the jacket. The shoes are black and polished, and the guard's hair is neatly slicked back. No hat or additional accessories are present, and the overall appearance is clean and authoritative.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, projecting an alert and formal demeanor.
